#build commands:

vcpkg install boost:x64-windows
vcpkg install cgal:x64-windows
vcpkg install --recurse gdal[archive,curl,expat,geos,gif,hdf5,iconv,jpeg,lerc,libkml,libspatialite,libxml2,lzma,mysql-libmariadb,netcdf,openjpeg,openssl,pcre2,png,poppler,postgresql,qhull,recommended-features,sqlite3,tools,webp,zstd,freexl]:x64-windows
vcpkg install yaml-cpp:x64-windows
